name: ui-card-battler-board
description: CardBattlerBoard — game-shell composition: HUD (mana/turn/result) + hand row of game-card atoms.

schema.name: ui-card-battler-board
schema.description: CardBattlerBoard — game-shell composition: HUD (mana/turn/result) + hand row of game-card atoms.

emits.description: Emits UI:{playCardEvent} with {cardId} when the player plays a card from hand
Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} when the player ends the turn
Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the match reaches won or lost
Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

events.name: Play Card
events.description: Emits UI:{playCardEvent} with {cardId} when the player plays a card from hand

events.name: End Turn
events.description: Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} when the player ends the turn

events.name: Game End
events.description: Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the match reaches won or lost

events.name: Play Again
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

manaCap.label: Mana Cap
manaCap.description: Maximum mana the per-turn ramp can reach.

turnsToWin.label: Turns To Win
turnsToWin.description: Survive this many turns to win the match.

maxMana.label: Starting Mana
maxMana.description: Mana the player starts each match with; also refills each turn.

drawPerTurn.label: Draw Per Turn
drawPerTurn.description: Cards drawn from the deck at the end of each turn.

assetManifest.label: Asset Manifest
assetManifest.description: Base-url + per-iconKey card-art sprite map for the hand and battlefield.

deck.label: Deck
deck.description: Draw deck — cards moved into hand at end of turn.

hand.label: Hand
hand.description: Opening hand dealt at INIT; takes priority over entity-derived hand.
